reliability: High (GlobeNewsWire, The Defiant, CryptoTimes, Yahoo Finance)
scanType: Focused scan: XMarket positioning & BNB Chain prediction market competitors
summary: XMarket launched Private Beta on BNB Chain mainnet February 27, 2026. Creator-focused model: anyone can create markets and earn up to 50% of trading fees. CLOB model (not AMM). 100% revenue share-back during beta. APAC-focused (Korea, Vietnam, Southeast Asia). Running $20K USDT prize pool Beta Aura Sprint.

Opinion: $20M raise (previous round) + $5M seed from YZi Labs (CZ's fund). Third-largest prediction market by volume ($653M weekly at peak), trailing only Polymarket ($967M) and Kalshi ($902M). Major BNB Chain competitor to XMarket.
Predict.fun acquired Probable (PancakeSwap/YZi Labs incubated) in March 2026. Consolidation happening on BNB Chain. Predict.fun offers yield-generating prediction funds.
PancakeSwap integrated prediction markets. BNB Chain has at least 4 prediction market platforms now: Opinion, XMarket, predict.fun (absorbed Probable), and PancakeSwap native predictions.
XMarket's differentiator is the creator model (market creators earn revenue) and pre-sale investment model for market backers. This is unique in the prediction market space.

relationships.relationship: deployed on mainnet (Private Beta since Feb 27 2026)
funded by ($5M seed + part of $20M raise)
same team (Master's projects). XMarket = spot prediction. LEVER = leverage layer.
potential integration: LEVER could offer leveraged positions on XMarket markets

workstreamTags.CEO: XMarket is live on BNB Chain mainnet. Competition is fierce: Opinion (YZi Labs backed, $653M weekly volume, third globally) is the dominant player. XMarket's creator model (revenue sharing with market creators) is a genuine differentiator. The LEVER+XMarket synergy story (spot prediction on BNB + leveraged positions on Base) is a powerful investor narrative.
workstreamTags.ADVISOR: BNB Chain prediction market consolidation is happening: predict.fun acquired Probable. Opinion dominates with YZi Labs backing. XMarket needs to differentiate aggressively on the creator economy angle before consolidation narrows the field. The XMarket->LEVER pipeline (create markets on XMarket, trade leveraged positions on LEVER) should be the strategic vision.
workstreamTags.BUILD: XMarket uses CLOB model. Interesting potential: could LEVER's OracleAdapter reference XMarket CLOB data as an additional oracle source alongside Polymarket? This would create a closed-loop ecosystem.
workstreamTags.IMPROVE: XMarket's 100% revenue share-back during beta is a strong growth hack. Opinion's points system drove $653M weekly volume. Study both approaches for LEVER's launch strategy.

sources.title: Yahoo Finance: PancakeSwap Prediction Markets / YZi Labs
